source_policy: Derived READ-ONLY from C:\SW_MUSH\data\weapons.yaml (armor rows) and C:\SW_MUSH\docs\design\Guide_01_WEG_D6_Core_Mechanics.md. SW_MUSH is strictly read-only reference; this file is the authoritative project-owned copy. Data flows one way: out of SW_MUSH into data/.
source_note: Ported 2026-06-24 from sw_mush weapons.yaml armor-type rows. Curated subset: Clone Wars-era (20 BBY) only. Protection values follow the XD/XD+y WEG pool string convention (prefix + for bonus above base Strength soak, as in prototype_combatants.json). dexterity_penalty is a negative pool string or empty string for no penalty. coverage is a list of body regions. Faction-issued armors (republic_light_armor, improved_armor, cis_field_armor, etc.) are included with vendor_stocked:false. Stormtrooper armor is excluded (Imperial-era framing). Non-protection identifier garments (republic_uniform, padawan_robes, jedi_robes, officers_uniform_republic) are included with zero protection values as-is — they matter for NPC recognition and faction systems. GEAR EXPANSION (2026-07-03): added 8 more Clone Wars-era armors adapted from C:\SW_MUSH\docs\design\gundarks_personal_gear_extraction_v1.md §3.1 (the WEG40158 'Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear' armor-catalog extraction, already era-translated per that doc's §8 cheat-sheet — no Imperial/GCW framing survives) — concussion_helmet_ct3, corellian_611, corellian_huntsuit, dura_armor, reflec_body_glove (contraband), stalker_armor_salus, gladiator_armor_mindal (contraband), arelik_armor (contraband). None of these appear as armor rows anywhere in weapons.yaml, so nothing here duplicates the earlier 2026-06-24 port. Integrated weapon mounts/sensors on a few of the source stat blocks are noted as lore-only until an armor-mount system exists; protection/coverage/cost values are fully modeled, matching this file's existing vendor_stocked:false convention for all non-core-book (i.e. non-Blast-Vest/Helmet) armor. Data flowed one-way out of the read-only C:\SW_MUSH; nothing there was modified.

koromondain_vest_mk45.name: Koromondain Vest (Mk 45)
koromondain_vest_mk45.notes: Mk 45 Personal Deflection System — a thin civilian underlayer.

concussion_vest_cv14.name: Concussion Vest (CV14-B)
concussion_vest_cv14.notes: Core World Arms padding — pure impact protection, nothing against blasters.

link_armor_supralink.name: Link Armor (SupraLink)
link_armor_supralink.notes: ProTech micro-link mesh. Full coverage, slightly stiff.

camo_armor_creshaldyne.name: Camo Scout Armor
camo_armor_creshaldyne.notes: Creshaldyne holo-camouflage weave. +1D to avoid being spotted while motionless (lore until hide/scan loop exists).

blast_vest_corondexx.name: Blast Vest (ablative)
blast_vest_corondexx.notes: Corondexx ablative weave — premium energy protection.

castaan_staad.name: Castaan Staad
castaan_staad.notes: Twi'lek craftwork — thin, flexible, wearable under street clothes. Discreet protection.

coynite_battle_armor.name: Coynite Battle Armor
coynite_battle_armor.notes: Ekkar Arms plant-fibre weave, astonishingly tough when genuine.

ubese_raider_armor.name: Ubese Raider Armor
ubese_raider_armor.notes: Stock Ubese pattern — full mobility, sealed helm.

flex_armor_ty1.name: Flex-Armor (TY1)
flex_armor_ty1.notes: Drolan Plasteel full-body suit of an Old Republic design that survived the Sith Wars.

labor_exo_frame_pl9.name: Loader Exo-Frame (PL-9)
labor_exo_frame_pl9.notes: Pelagia Heavy Industries cargo-loader exo-frame, plated for field use. Servo-assisted Strength bonus +1D; halved without Powersuit Operation skill.

republic_uniform.name: Republic Service Uniform
republic_uniform.notes: Off-white Republic-issue tunic and trousers. No combat protection — identifier/faction garment only. Faction-issued only.

republic_light_armor.name: Republic Combat Plate
republic_light_armor.notes: Phase II clone trooper armor segments adapted for non-clone wearers. Physical soak only. Faction-issued only.

improved_armor.name: Improved Body Armor
improved_armor.notes: Officer-grade composite armor. Full-body composite. Faction-issued at rank 2; not for open sale.

smuggler_vest.name: Smuggler's Vest
smuggler_vest.notes: Multi-pocket vest with concealed plating. Physical-only protection, torso cover. Faction-issued only.

padawan_robes.name: Padawan Robes
padawan_robes.notes: Tan and brown Jedi robes worn by apprentices. No combat protection — identifier garment. Faction-issued only.

jedi_robes.name: Jedi Knight Robes
jedi_robes.notes: The earned robes of a Jedi Knight. No mechanical combat protection per WEG40120 Jedi templates. Faction-issued only.

cis_field_armor.name: CIS Field Armor
cis_field_armor.notes: Standard CIS-issue field plate for organic operatives. Per WEG40120 generic field-armor-and-helmet stat block. Chain graduation reward; not for open sale.

flight_suit_republic.name: Republic Pilot Flight Suit
flight_suit_republic.notes: Sealed flight suit with life support and Republic comm rig. Physical protection only — primary value is environmental. Faction-issued only.

officers_uniform_republic.name: Republic Officer's Uniform
officers_uniform_republic.notes: Pressed Republic Navy dress uniform. No combat protection — identifier/rank garment only. Faction-issued only.

concussion_helmet_ct3.name: Concussion Helmet
concussion_helmet_ct3.notes: Core World Arms CT3 — a cheap antique pattern, physical protection only (crash and fall damage included). Pairs with the Concussion Vest (CV14-B).

corellian_611.name: Corellian 611
corellian_611.notes: Licensed Corellian pattern, no Dexterity penalty despite full head/torso coverage. Book: +1D swim difficulty while worn — lore until a swim mechanic exists.

corellian_huntsuit.name: Corellian HuntSuit
corellian_huntsuit.notes: Full-body hunting suit. Book: +1D lift, integral sensor +1D to Search within 50 m — lore until those mechanics exist.

dura_armor.name: Dura-Armor
dura_armor.notes: Core World Arms — an Old-Republic vehicle-crew pattern that survived into the Clone Wars as prized antique plate. Book also applies a Perception penalty alongside the Dexterity penalty; only the Dexterity penalty is modeled until a Perception-soak interaction exists.

reflec_body_glove.name: Reflec Body Glove
reflec_body_glove.notes: Syncronics ENVC-370 — reflective full-body wrap, good for roughly 5 blaster hits before it's spent. Book: the +1D bonus only applies at medium/long range and the suit is single-use disposable — both stay lore until a charge/range-gated protection mechanic exists.

stalker_armor_salus.name: Stalker Armor
stalker_armor_salus.notes: Salus Corp armored hardsuit. Book integrates a tangier gun, duo-flechette launcher, forearm blade, and +1D sensors into the suit — those mounts are lore until an armor-weapon-mount system exists; protection values are fully modeled.

gladiator_armor_mindal.name: Gladiator Armor
gladiator_armor_mindal.notes: Min-Dal JX4 prototype — the pattern surfaces in Geonosian arena pits (Petranaki-style bouts) and off-world gladiator rings. Book integrates a net gun, vibro-shiv, and a short jet pack into the suit — those mounts are lore until an armor-weapon-mount system exists. Prototype; not for open sale.

arelik_armor.name: Arelik Armor
arelik_armor.notes: A stock bounty-hunter pattern with integrated sensor, IR, and enviro-filter systems (lore until those mechanics exist). Rare black-market plate; not for open sale.
